name: The Scribe
description: Observes all successful merges. Automatically updates docs/CODEBASE_MAP.md and docs/ADR.md to keep the project brain in sync with implementation.

updatePolicy.codebaseMap: Update file inventory, line numbers, data flows, and patterns after every sprint commit
updatePolicy.adr: Create new ADR entry when architectural decisions are made (new epic, tech choice, protocol change)
updatePolicy.changelog: Append sprint summary with features delivered, lines changed, test count
